lines.raw: Lesson 65 | 第65课
Not a baby | 不是小孩子

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答问题。

lines.english: Does Jill take the key to the front door?
lines.chinese: 吉尔拿走了前门的钥匙吗？
lines.raw: Does Jill take the key to the front door? | 吉尔拿走了前门的钥匙吗？

lines.english: What are you going to do this evening, Jill?
lines.chinese: 吉尔，你今晚打算做什么？
lines.raw: What are you going to do this evening, Jill? | 吉尔，你今晚打算做什么？

lines.english: I'm going to meet some friends, Dad.
lines.chinese: 爸爸，我打算去见几个朋友。
lines.raw: I'm going to meet some friends, Dad. | 爸爸，我打算去见几个朋友。
You mustn't come home late. | 你不许回来太晚。

lines.english: You must be home at half past ten.
lines.chinese: 你必须在十点半之前到家。
lines.raw: You must be home at half past ten. | 你必须在十点半之前到家。

lines.english: I can't get home so early, Dad!
lines.chinese: 爸爸，我不能那么早回家！
lines.raw: I can't get home so early, Dad! | 爸爸，我不能那么早回家！

lines.english: Can I have the key to the front door, please?
lines.raw: Can I have the key to the front door, please? | 我能拿前门的钥匙吗？
No, you can't. | 不，你不能。

lines.chinese: 吉尔已经十八岁了，汤姆。
lines.raw: Jill's eighteen years old, Tom. | 吉尔已经十八岁了，汤姆。
She's not a baby. | 她不是小孩子。
Give her the key. | 把钥匙给她吧。
She always comes home early. | 她总是回家很早的。
Oh, all right! | 哦，好吧！
Here you are. | 给你。

lines.english: But you mustn't come home after a quarter past eleven.
lines.chinese: 但是你不能在十一点一刻之后回家。
lines.raw: But you mustn't come home after a quarter past eleven. | 但是你不能在十一点一刻之后回家。
Do you hear? | 听到了吗？
Yes, Dad. | 是的，爸爸。
Thanks, Mum. | 谢谢，妈妈。
That's all right. | 没关系。
Goodbye. | 再见。
Enjoy yourself! | 玩得开心！

lines.chinese: 妈妈，我们总是玩得很开心的。
lines.raw: We always enjoy ourselves, Mum. | 妈妈，我们总是玩得很开心的。
Bye-bye. | 再见。
